description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a minimalist rectangular frame upholstered in a light gray fabric. The seat features a single, continuous cushion, while the backrest is lined with three large, loose back cushions of matching fabric. Two accent pillows, one deep red and one bright green, add a pop of color to the left side, and a textured blue throw is draped over the right armrest. The sofa stands on four slender, black metal legs positioned at each corner, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The armrests are straight, low, and flush with the backrest, contributing to the clean-lined, contemporary aesthetic. The overall look is soft and inviting, with a subtle contrast between the neutral upholstery and the colorful accessories.
description: A modern light gray sofa with three back cushions, colorful accent pillows, a blue throw, and slim black metal legs. The design is minimalist and inviting, with straight armrests and a single seat cushion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, three back cushions, two colorful accent pillows, and a blue throw on the right armrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the blue throw draped over the armrest, and the colorful pillows partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous back panel and the tops of the three back cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue throw over the armrest and a partial glimpse of the accent pillows and seat cushion.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion; two small accent pillows placed on the left side; cushions are uniform in size and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests that are flush with the backrest and seat, with no visible padding or decorative elements; minimalist and rectangular in shape.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at each corner; legs are straight, exposed, and slightly elevate the sofa off the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented frame with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
